sentences.text: Thank you for calling San Antonio housing authority this call may be recorded for quality assurance. Please listen to all of the following options. As our menu has changed our hours of operation are Monday through Friday eight AM to five PM for English please press one for Spanish please press two. If you are a current applicant or need housing assistance. Please press one. If you currently receive housing assistance and need information regarding your account please press two. If you are a current housing choice about your landlord or you are interested in becoming a landlord partner with San Antonio housing authority, please press three. If you are not sure what type of assistance you need and would like to speak with a customer service representative please press four. If you would like to report fraud and abuse please press five. If you wish to reach San Antonio housing authorities human resources department or other departments, please press nine to go to previous menu press Star and to go back to main menu press pound. Thank you for calling C S R Q N this call is being recorded. If you do not wish to be recorded. Please disconnect at this time. Please hold for the next available agent.

conversation.title: Call: Dither  Castro  and MaryAnn Santiago @ Beacon Communities
